title: Herstellung von Vanille: vom Anbau bis zum Vanilleeis
description:
Vanille gilt als die Königin der Gewürze, doch wie genau verläuft die Herstellung?

Wir zeigen den Weg vom Anbau in Madagaskar über die Ernte und Trocknung bis zur Gewinnung des aromatischen Vanille-Extrakts für Lebensmittel in der ganzen Welt. Und wir erklären wie die Vanille ihr volles Aroma entfalten kann. 

Nestlé setzt bei der Lebensmittelherstellung auf natürliche Vanille aus kontrolliertem Anbau seit Mai 2014 in zahlreichen Produkten ein, etwa allen Produkten von Nestlé Schöller und Mövenpick aus deutscher Herstellung, die Vanilleeis enthalten. Davon profitieren  Plantagenarbeiter, Umwelt und Verbraucher. 

-------------------------------

Zusätzliche Informationen zur Vanille und der Vanilleherstellung finden Sie hier: http://www.nestle.de/themenwelten/dossier/vanille

Sie möchten mehr über die Herkunft unserer Rohstoffe erfahren: http://www.nestle.de/verantwortung

title: Tag der Qualität - Ein Blick hinter die Kulissen von Nestlé
description:
Schauen Sie hinter die Kulissen der Nahrungsmittelproduktion: Nestlé öffnet seine Werke.

Immer weniger Menschen wissen, was Qualität eigentlich bedeutet. Doch diese ist insbesondere bei der Lebensmittelherstellung von größter Bedeutung. Nestlé-Werke in ganz Deutschland haben deshalb 2014 zum dritten Mal ihre Tore geöffnet und interessierten Verbrauchern, Journalisten, NGOs und Vertretern aus Politik und Wirtschaft einen Blick hinter die Kulissen gegeben. 

Bei Präsentationen und Werksführung erlebten die Besucher, nach welchen hohen Standards Nestlé-Produkte der Marken Nescafé, KitKat oder Maggi hergestellt werden. Im Fokus standen die vier Qualitätsdimensionen Ernährung, Sicherheit, Umwelt und Gesellschaft, über die sich die Gäste vor Ort ein Bild machen und mit den Nestlé Mitarbeitern austauschen konnten. Mit dabei waren auch das Bübchen Werk in Soest und das Thomy Werk in Neuss.

-----------------------------

Wie Nestlé seinen Qualitätsanspruch umfassend umsetzt, erfahren Sie hier: http://www.nestle-marktplatz.de/view/Qualitaet

Unsere Mitarbeiter nehmen Qualität persönlich: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL4b5X6KCsr9bqUWf1l9aydMMuq-XluPxh

Sehen Sie, wie sich Verbraucher bei Nestlé einbringen:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LuEKmotibNE

title: Nestlé Zukunftsstudie: Algen und Insekten künftig auch auf deutschen Tellern vorstellbar?
description:
Gut 50% der Menschen hierzulande möchte sich in Zukunft ressourcenschonend und gesund ernähren.

Dies ist ein Ergebnis der Nestlé Zukunftsstudie „Wie is(s)t Deutschland 2030?“.
 
Für diese Zielsetzung sind viele auch bereit, künftig Algen und Insekten auf dem Teller zu akzeptieren.

Ob personalisierte Produkte via App, Fertigprodukte zur Leistungsoptimierung oder Food-Communities zum online Großeinkauf: 80 Prozent der Deutschen finden sich in einem der fünf angebotenen Szenarien der Nestlé Zukunftsstudie wieder und stehen neuen Entwicklungen offen gegenüber.

title: Das Nestlé Zukunftsforum fragt: „Wie möchten die Deutschen künftig essen?“
description:
Wie sieht unser Ernährungsverhalten im Jahr 2030 aus? Wie und was essen wir?

Auf welche Weise beeinflussen sich gesellschaftlicher Wandel und Veränderungen beim Ernährungsverhalten? Wie wirkt sich das auf unsere Lebensmittel aus?

Mit diesen Fragen hat sich der Beirat des Nestlé Zukunftsforums (NZF) beschäftigt und eine Studie zur Ernährung der Zukunft in Auftrag gegeben. Dabei kamen Experten aus unterschiedlichen Bereichen und Verbraucher zusammen, um über die Ernährung der Zukunft zu beraten.

Der Film beleuchtet die Entstehung der Nestlé Zukunftsstudie „Wie is(s)t Deutschland 2030?“ und gibt Einblicke in die Arbeit der Experten des NZF.

title: 3. Sitzung des Nestlé Verbraucherbeirats
description:
Wie können sich die Verbraucher bei Nestlé zum Thema Qualität engagieren? 

Die Nestlé Qualitätsinitiative wird durch zwei Beiräte begleitet und unterstützt.
Ein Beirat mit Vertretern von Nichtregierungsorganisationen und Experten aus Wissenschaft und Praxis, der Experten- und NGO-Beirat, bringt gesellschaftliche Herausforderungen oder Diskussionen sowie Expertise zu den Qualitätsdimensionen in das Programm ein. Ein Verbraucherbeirat trägt dazu bei, dass Nestlé noch enger am Puls der Verbraucher arbeitet.

Lebensmittelsicherheit ist eines der zentralen Themen des Verbraucherschutzes. Durch den Austausch mit Konsumenten geht Nestlé auf Erwartungen und Vorschläge der Verbraucher ein. 

-------------------------------

Nestlé arbeitet eng mit dem Verbraucherbeirat zusammen: http://www.nestle-marktplatz.de/view/Qualitaet/verbraucherbeirat_navi

title: Was ist eigentlich Gluten? - Nestlé Glutenfree Cornflakes
description:
Welche Nahrungsmittel enthalten Gluten, was bedeutet Zöliakie oder auch Gluten-Sensitivität? 

Personen mit Zöliakie leiden an einer Glutenunverträglichkeit und ernähren sich deshalb normalerweise glutenfrei. Wiederum andere sind einfach neugierig darauf, ob sie sich ohne Gluten anders fühlen. 

Während also die einen Gluten wegen Unverträglichkeit meiden, gibt es auch sehr viele andere, die zu glutenfreien Produkten greifen, obwohl sie es nicht müssen. 

Nestlé Cerealien bietet jetzt eine unkomplizierte Möglichkeit für ein beliebtes glutenfreies Familien-Frühstück: Die neuen Nestlé Glutenfree Cornflakes.

Die hohe Jugendarbeitslosigkeit in Europa stellt unsere Gesellschaft vor eine große Herausforderung.

title: Nestlé Studie 2011 - Die Deutschen entwickeln sich zu Mobile Eatern
description:
Warum gibt es immer mehr Mobile Eater? Und was hat das für Konsequenzen?

Das Ernährungsverhalten der Deutschen hat sich stark verändert. Das Essen unterwegs gehört zum Alltag der Deutschen dazu. Erfahren Sie mehr über Gründe und Folgen darüber, warum 80 Prozent der Vollzeit-Berufstätigen mittags außer Haus essen. 

Eine Konsequenz davon: Die Betroffenen sind überzeugt zu viel Süßes und Fast food zu essen. Das liegt aber auch am Angebot an gesunden Alternativen, die viele als zu gering wahrnehmen. Am Wochenende wird dann das Bedürfnis nach einem entspannten Essen nachgeholt. 

--------------------------

title: Employee Profile: Valérie Philips, General Counsel
description:
Making the most of one's circumstances is a skill that can enhance knowledge and conquer obstacles. Zurich is not usually thought of as a water-lovers' paradise. But to those who know where to look, including Valérie this special aspect of the city offers unique chances. Such resourcefulness extends to her role as chairing the Women's Network. "Women have a lot of leadership capabilities" vital to the industry, she says. Learn more about unlocking potential. 

---------------------------------------------------------------------
Read more stories from the 2011 Company Profile: 
http://www.credit-suisse.com/cp

title: Youth Employment Initiative: Junge Spanier auf ihrem Weg zu Nestlé Deutschland
description:
Nestlé möchte mit ihrer Initiative vielen jungen Menschen eine Perspektive geben.

Jeder zweite Jugendliche in Spanien ist arbeitslos. Die Nestlé Youth Employment Initiative will dies ändern und bietet 20.000 Jobperspektiven für junge Menschen aus Europa bis 2016. Ein Besuch bei fünf jungen Spaniern in Girona, die ihre Ausbildung bei Nestlé Deutschland beginnen möchten.

Begleiten Sie die jungen Spanier und erfahren sie mehr über die Nestlé Youth Employment Initiative.

------------------------------

Wer Alberto und Amin im Nestlé-Werk über die Schulter schauen möchte, kann das hier tun: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6kbuV0z2a9I

Hier finden Sie alles Wichtige zur Youth Employment Initiative: http://www.nestle.de/verantwortung/youth-employment-initiative

description:
Sedef hastalığıyla yaşamak, doğrular ve yanlışlar, aile ve iş yaşamı üzerine sedef hastalarından diğer hastalara öneriler… Çünkü yalnız değilsiniz!

title: Sedef Hastalarından Topluma Mesajlar
description:
Türkiye’de bir milyondan fazla kişiyi etkilediği tahmin edilen ve bulaşıcı olmayan sedef hastalığının toplum tarafından bulaşıcı bir hastalık olarak algılanması hastaların hem özel, hem de çalışma yaşamını olumsuz etkilemektedir. title: Debora's story - a mother touched by telemedicine
description:
Following the birth of her daughter Regina, Debora started bleeding. The Community Health Officer, Louisa, was on call at the local clinic and was able to manage the case with the support of a mobile phone and the telemedicine project in Ghana, which connected her to a doctor at the district hospital for advice.

The Novartis Foundation collaborates with the Earth Institute, Millennium Villages Project, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Communications and Ghana Health Service on a groundbreaking telemedicine program in Ghana. The program has extended mobile networks and equipped community health workers with new tools and training that have brought skilled medical care directly to communities in underserved villages.

http://www.novartisfoundation.org

Sebagai bentuk komitmen MILO terhadap olahraga, MILO menggelar MILO School Competition, kompetisi badminton antar sekolah; MILO 10k Run, acara lari maraton 10 km; dan MILO Sepakbola, program beasiswa sekolah sepakbola.

title: Daniel's story - supporting community health workers in rural areas via mobile phone
description:
Daniel is a nurse at the St Martins Hospital in Agroyesum, Ghana. In addition to his work in the emergency room, Daniel also staffs the teleconsultation center (TCC) where he is connected via phone to provide support to health workers based in rural areas to reduce unnecessary referrals and allow for immediate support in the event of medical emergencies.

The Novartis Foundation collaborates with the Earth Institute, Millennium Villages Project, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Communications and Ghana Health Service on a groundbreaking telemedicine program in Ghana. The program has extended mobile networks and equipped community health workers with new tools and training that have brought skilled medical care directly to communities in underserved villages.

http://www.novartisfoundation.org

title: Centers of Excellence (CoEs) - Experience our CoE in Wroclaw, Poland
description:
Meet the people who swiftly and consistently deliver vital, high quality services across the globe through our Centers of Excellence (CoEs).  

The CoEs play a critical role in improving operational effectiveness and reducing the bank's cost base by providing both colleagues internally and clients externally with products and services. Today, around 12,500 roles are performed in our five centers in Mumbai, Pune, Raleigh, Singapore and Wroclaw.

The CoE in Wroclaw recruits many of its employees from the approximately 35,000 students who graduate each year from nearby universities, technical colleges and well-known research institutes. The result is a highly qualified, multilingual group of professionals who perform a wide range of value-added tasks and services.

Meet some of the employees who work in the CoE in Wroclaw.

description:
Andrea Schwalber ist Ernährungswissenschaftlerin bei Maggi und hat ein wachsames Auge auf die Rezepturen und Zutaten. Sie achtet darauf, dass die vielen Maggi Produkte den internen Nährwertkriterien entsprechen, die – basierend auf den Empfehlungen der Weltgesundheitsorganisation (WHO) – für die verschiedenen Produktgruppen definiert wurden.

Maggi hat sich zum Ziel gesetzt, bis Ende 2016 den Gehalt an Salz und gesättigten Fettsäuren über das gesamte Sortiment hinweg um durchschnittlich 10 % zu reduzieren.

title: Halbjahresergebnis 2015 der LUKB – der Kommentar von CEO Daniel Salzmann
description: Die ersten sechs Monate 2015 der Luzerner Kantonalbank AG (LUKB) waren geprägt vom Druck, den die aktuellen Negativzinsen auf die Ertragslage der Bank ausüben. Durch Volumenwachstum, stabile Ausleihungsmargen und Kostenreduktionen konnte die LUKB die Auswirkungen der Negativzinsen jedoch weitgehend kompensieren und weist einen Halbjahresgewinn von 91.4 Millionen Franken aus. Das sind 3.2 Millionen Franken bzw. 3.4 % weniger als im ersten Halbjahr 2014. Die LUKB geht für das ganze Geschäftsjahr 2015 unverändert von einem Ergebnis aus, das im Rahmen des Vorjahres liegen dürfte (2014 nach neuer Rechnungslegung: 181.8 Millionen Franken).

description:
Sukh und Christian kommen aus Spanien und machen eine Ausbildung zum Mechatroniker bei Nestlé in Hamburg.

Ermöglicht hat dies die Youth Employment Initiative (YEI), mit der seit dem Start 2013 über 8.000 junge Menschen Arbeit an europäischen Nestlé Standorten gefunden haben.
Dadurch wird jungen Europäern eine Jobperspektive geboten.

Für die beiden Spanier ist die Ausbildung bei Nestlé eine große Chance, denn "Deutsch zu können und hier in Deutschland eine Ausbildung absolviert zu haben, ist viel wert".

Und auch sonst haben sich die spanischen Azubis gut eingelebt: Sie haben Freunde gefunden, gehen auf Partys und erkunden Hamburg.

title: Dialog über Qualität: Georg Abel von der Verbraucher Initiative
description:
Georg Abel ist Geschäftsführer der Verbraucher Initiative und Sprecher des Nestlé Experten- und NGO-Beirats.

In diesen Funktionen begleitet er das Unternehmen aus Verbrauchersicht und hilft Nestlé dabei, in den einzelnen Schritten der Lieferkette besser zu werden. 
Dazu zählt unter anderem die Reduktion von Salz und Zucker in den Produkten oder eine Verbesserung des Anbaus von Kaffee und Kakao. Im Video berichtet er zudem über die Bedeutung von Dialogbereitschaft, Transparenz und dem breiten Ansatz der Qualitätsinitiative.

title: Nestlé Vanille aus verantwortungsvollem Anbau
description:
Nestlé setzt sich im Rahmen des Responsible Sourcing Programms für den verantwortungsvollen Anbau von Rohstoffen ein, darunter auch Vanille. Im Video erzählt Vanillebauer Simon aus Madagaskar von seiner täglichen Arbeit und wie der Anbau von Vanille funktioniert. 

Justin Jacquat, verantwortlich für Responsible Sourcing bei Nestlé, hat sich vor Ort den Vanilleanbau genauer angeschaut. Denn für ihn bedeutet verantwortungsvoller Anbau, zu wissen, wo die Rohstoffe und Zutaten für Produkte herkommen und zudem die Arbeitsweisen der Partner vor Ort zu verbessern.

Darüber hinaus erklärt er, wie die Lieferkette aufgebaut ist – also wie die Vanille von Bauer Simon bis zu Nestlé kommt. Durch die enge Zusammenarbeit sind heute 100 Prozent der für die Nestlé-Eisproduktion verwendeten Vanille bis zur Farm zurückverfolgbar.

Im Rahmen der Zusammenarbeit unterstützt Nestlé Programme für verantwortungsvollen Einkauf, baut Schulen um Zugang zu Bildung zu ermöglichen, hilft den Vanillebauern die Ernteerträge ihrer Nahrungspflanzen wie Reis zu optimieren und baut Gesundheitszentren und Brunnen.

Sie wollen mehr über Vanille erfahren? Auf unserer Webseite finden Sie weitere Informationen: http://www.nestle.de/themenwelten/dossier/vanille

Ein Nestlé-Team aus Deutschland hat sich auch auf die Reise zum Ursprung der Vanille begeben. Erfahren Sie im Reisebericht mehr über die einzelnen Stationen und Erlebnisse: http://www.nestle.de/themenwelten/einblicke/vanilleanbau/madagaskar-reise-vanille

description: Die LUKB hat im Geschäftsjahr 2014 einen Unternehmensgewinn nach Steuern von 181.5 Millionen Franken erzielt. Mai 2015 eine Dividende von unverändert 11 Franken brutto pro Aktie.

title: Şeker Hastalığında Organ Hasarı
description:
Bu filmde "Şeker Hastalığında Organ Hasarına" ilişkin bilgi bulabilirsiniz.

Novartis Türkiye tarafından hazırlanan 8 filmi izleyerek diyabet (şeker hastalığı) ile ilgili detaylı bilgi edinebilirsiniz.
Genel olarak diyabet (şeker hastalığı) ile ilgili dikkat edilmesi gerekenler, belirtileri, risk altında olanlar, tanısında değerlendirilen ölçümler, kalp ve damar hastalıkları üzerine etkileri, ayak bakımında dikkat edilmesi gerekenler, kan şekeri düşüklüğü (hipoglisemi) nedir, belirtileri nelerdir ve yapılması gerekenler, yaşam tarzı değişikliğinde dikkat edilmesi gerekenlere dair detaylı bilgi edinebilirsiniz.

"Bu film bilgilendirme amaçlı hazırlanmıştır. Bu filmdeki bilgiler, bir hekim veya eczacıya danışmanın yerine geçemez. Daha fazla bilgi için bir hekime ve/veya bir eczacıya başvurunuz."

title: Insights into living with COPD
description:
We all have the power to change our lives for the better. Watch this video to see how people with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) from around the world are setting themselves realistic goals to help improve their health and lives.  You too can make a change. Set your own challenge today and share your story at http://www.copdlifeiscalling.com 

UPDATE: We are saddened to hear of Dr. Luísa Soares Branco’s passing in early 2016, and our thoughts are with her friends and family. Luísa was President of RESPIRA, the Portuguese Association for people living with COPD and chronic respiratory disease, and we have chosen to keep this video live online to honor her tireless and courageous efforts in advocating for COPD patients.

For more information about her work (Portuguese language only) visit: http://bit.ly/1UmkBfq

© 2015 Novartis Pharmaceuticals

title: Chronic Myeloid Leukaemia Journey
description:
Chronic Myeloid Leukaemia (CML) has changed beyond recognition over the past 50 years. Once a fatal cancer, today it has become a chronic condition with patients able to expect a normal lifespan. As part of our What if? What now? campaign, this is the first in a series of animated videos. This animation maps out the key clinical milestones over the last few years. Importantly, it also explores what patients may be able to expect in the future as treatment continues to evolve.

©Novartis 2014

description:
Yaşam değerlidir. Sağlıklı ve normal bir yaşam sürebilmek, sevdiklerimizle birlikte hayatı coşkuyla kucaklamak her şeyden daha değerlidir. 
Novartis olarak 60 yıldır sağlıklı bir Türkiye için çalışıyoruz. 1955’ten bugüne ülkemizin sağlıklı yarınları için aynı coşku ve inançla ilerliyoruz.

title: Patient-centered tuberculosis treatment - Training video - Swahili
description: Utaratibu wa kumpa fursa mgonjwa wa TB kuchagua mahali na msimamizi wa matibabu yake (PCT), ulianzishwa nchini Tanzania mwaka 2005. Utaratibu huu unampa mgonjwa uwezo wa kuchagua mahali pa kunywa dawa za kutibu TB kila siku chini ya usimamizi: ama kwenye kituo cha tiba chini ya uangalizi wa mtaalamu wa afya au nyumbani kwa kusimamiwa na ndugu au mwana jamii aliyemteua mwenyewe. Filamu hii inawaelekeza wahudumu wa afya, wasimamizi na wagonjwa wenyewe jinsi ya kutumia utaratibu huu ikiwemo wajibu na majukumu ya kila mmoja wao.

title: Louisa's story - community health worker connected
description:
Following the birth of her daughter Regina, Debora started bleeding. The Community Health Officer, Louisa, was on call at the local clinic and was able to manage the case with the support of a mobile phone and the telemedicine project in Ghana, which connected her to a doctor at the district hospital for advice.

The Novartis Foundation collaborates with the Earth Institute, Millennium Villages Project, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Communications and Ghana Health Service on a groundbreaking telemedicine program in Ghana. The program has extended mobile networks and equipped community health workers with new tools and training that have brought skilled medical care directly to communities in underserved villages.

http://www.novartisfoundation.org

title: Supporting U.S. Veterans | What You Do Matters More
description:
As a global industry leader, Nestlé USA is proud to offer numerous opportunities to veterans of the U.S. military, helping them use their unique training and skills within our organization's operating companies. We are privileged to work alongside such outstanding individuals who not only give to our organization, but to our country as well. For more information on careers available at Nestlé USA please visit: https://www.NestleUSA.com/Careers/ 

Nestlé USA is committed to enhancing the lives of people, pets, and the communities where we live and work. As the leading nutrition, health and wellness company, we are committed to enhancing people’s lives, everywhere, every day. We strive to make our brands tastier and healthier choices that help consumers care for themselves and their families, thus earning their trust and recommendations to others. Delivering on this commitment enables us to create long-term sustainable value for our consumers and customers, for our communities, for our shareholders and for our employees.

description:
När jag fick veta att det var MS var min första tanke - hur länge ska jag vara sjukskriven?

"- Det jag behöver är flexibilitet, som att veta att om jag mår dåligt en dag så kan det funka i alla fall".

Det kan kännas svårt att få reda på att man har multipel skleros (MS). Många reagerar med ilska, chock, depression eller oro. Många känner också behov av att skaffa sig kontroll. Det finns mycket resurser och stöd och många effektiva behandlingsalternativ som kan hjälpa dig. 

Läs mer på http://www.msliv.se/

title: New Report on Strategic Philanthropy
description:
A new report from Credit Suisse and Rockefeller Philanthropy Advisors, entitled, "Strategic Philanthropy: Guide to Evaluation," provides greater context and clarity around evaluation, drawing from a review of best practices, interviews conducted by Rockefeller Philanthropy Advisors and examples from a variety of case studies, to address why philanthropists think about evaluation. The paper also gives an overview of the major trends and practices in evaluation, and provides suggestions on how philanthropists can make evaluation effective for their work.

More information: https://www.credit-suisse.com/upload/news-live/000000022546.pdf

title: Digital Transformation at Nestlé (DAT)
description:
Can digital inspire a large company to think and act like a start-up? Watch Nestlé's fourth Digital Acceleration Team (DAT) put that question to the test.

The DAT is an intensive, highly-entrepreneurial, hands-on 8-month training programme that rotates high-potential brand building talent into our Global Headquarters in Switzerland. The DAT is grounded in three pillars of digital excellence - Listening, Engaging, Inspiring & Transforming. Upon completion of the programme, DAT alumni return to their home market to lead digitally-powered brand building and eCommerce transformation.

Here, the fourth DAT (#DAT4) tells you about their achievements and experiences working at Nestlé HQ. Tune in to see how they #raisethebar.

title: Journey of Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML)
description:
"Journey of Chronic Myeloid Leukemia" is the story of a fatal cancer that has been transformed into a chronic condition. CML is now considered the model for targeted therapy in hematology and oncology, as successful treatment has provided hope and inspiration for a number of other diseases. This video was originally displayed at the 17th Annual Congress of the European Hematological Association (EHA) in Amsterdam June 14 - 17, 2012.

This video was produced in collaboration with the EHA.

For more information, please visit: http://novartisoncology.com

title: Nestlé spreads its wings to support UK butterflies - 75 acres of butterfly meadows to be created
description:
The homes of KIT KAT, NESCAFE, BUXTON and ROWNTREE'S are sowing the seeds to help halt the decline of the UK's butterfly population as part of a new national programme.  Nestlé UK & Ireland will co-ordinate the planting of nearly 75 acres of butterfly meadows -- the equivalent of almost 250 football pitches - with the aim of attracting more than 10 varieties of butterflies to the sites.

By 2015 all thirteen UK sites will have a wildflower meadow within the factory grounds.  In addition, seven dairy farmers, part of the Nestlé First Milk Sustainability Partnership have joined the programme to boost the total to 75 acres.  The farmers are from the group who supply the Girvan factory in Scotland with around 70 million litres of milk each year to be used in Nestlé's milk chocolate and will plant wildflower meadows on their land.  Nestlé will look to further expand the programme across the entire supply chain.

title: Анкерная заклёпка TU- S (анкер типа Kайл (Keil)
description:
http://sfs-intec.ru/  Саморезы компании SFS intec на сайте официального дистрибьютора в Российской Федерации, Беларуси и Казахстане.
0:16 Монтаж анкерной заклёпки TU-S (анкер типа Кайл (Keil).
Анкерная заклёпка TU-S (анкер типа Кайл (Keil).
Компаний SFS intec разработана анкерная заклепка TU-S для скрытого крепления фасадных панелей HPL, ROCK-панелей и керамогранита. 
Система TU-S используется для крепления кронштейнов на задней 
стороне HPL-панели, ROCK-панели и керамогранита толщиной 8-13 мм. Скрытое крепление TU-S от компании SFS intec простотой и удобно в монтаже, на установке экономится до 30% времени (по сравнению с традиционными система скрытого монтажа). Для монтажа не требуется специальный инструмент. Скрытое крепление TU-S при необходимости демонтируется без специального инструмента. При установке крепёж невозможно перекрутить. За счёт расширения в материале и специальной резьбе крепёж имеет высокие показатели на вырыв. Самопроизвольное выкручивание крепежа невозможно. Эстетика фасада. Окраска в любые цвета RAL. 
Инновационное скрытое крепление для облицовка фасада и отделка фасадов. TU-S – это также скрытое крепление керамогранита на фасад, для вентилируемый керамогранит. Применяется в качестве: скрытые крепления панелей, скрытая система крепления, скрытое крепление стеновых панелей, саморезы для скрытого крепления. Заклепки SFS – гарантия европейского качества. На нашем сайте SFS intec, СФС – www.sfs-intec.ru – Вы найдете SFS intec каталог саморезы, SFS каталог. 
Анкерная заклёпка TU-S (анкер типа Кайл (Keil).

title: Be Healthy: the first company-wide health and well-being initiative at Novartis
description:
This video was produced for a segment in CNBC's "Responsible Business Television" series.

As a healthcare company, Novartis recognizes that employees are an integral part of the company's success and a healthy workforce underpins business growth. The "Be Healthy" initiative, first introduced in 2011, has expanded this year to include more than 95% of Novartis associates across 140 countries. This first company-wide health and well-being program provides a platform for managing health, promoting lifestyle changes and encouraging associates to increase physical exercise and make healthy eating choices. Be Healthy is an internal initiative for the benefit of Novartis associates.

title: Spark® 20M - Tomorrow´s imaging multimode plate reader
description:
Tecan has launched the Spark® 20M multimode microplate reader, offering tailor-made solutions to suit virtually any drug discovery or advanced life science research application. This freely configurable system gives researchers access to new techniques and features intended to enhance and streamline biochemical and cell-based workflows. At the heart of the instrument are Spark’s unique Fusion Optics and a powerful xenon flash lamp, which can be combined with your choice of high performance detection modules to ensure a perfect match for your workflow. Options include an enhanced fluorescence module designed to improve sensitivity and increase the speed of high throughput screening, and the newly developed Te-Cool™ cooling module that uniquely allows the measurement chamber temperature to be set below the ambient room temperature for more accurate and reliable results.
The Spark 20M’s cell handling capabilities have also been extended, with a new automated cell imaging and confluence measurement feature. This allows incubation and monitoring of cell culture microplates within the measurement chamber, enabling the user to define the confluence at which the assay starts/ends or the substrate is injected, for optimal assay results and greater walkaway operation. These new options – combined with the ability to read 6- to 1,536-well microplates – ensure there is a Spark 20M configuration to increase the productivity of your lab, both today and in the future.

Spark® multimode reader is a research use only

title: Panalpina: Behind the scenes of our relief flight with UNICEF for Burundi
description:
In this mission, Panalpina helps UNICEF to fly much-needed relief goods from Europe to Burundi to replenish the nationwide medication supply chain, which was on the verge of complete stock out. The 70 tons of primary medical care goods such as antibiotics, analgesics, infusion sets and hospital equipment, were distributed to health centers, where sick children under five and pregnant women can access free healthcare and medication. Once at the health districts, these vital goods were distributed to the over 960 health centers and hospitals across the country’s 18 provinces. 

You can find additional information related to Panalpina’s relief flight to Burundi on the following UNICEF pages:
https://www.facebook.com/unicef.ch
https://www.facebook.com/UNICEFBurundi/?fref=ts
www.unicef.ch

For more about our previous relief flights for UNICEF: 
In 2014 to Sierra Leone http://www.panalpina.com/sierraleone
In 2013 to Central African Republic http://www.panalpina.com/centralafricanrepublic

title: AC Extraction Plate* with EVO and Touch Tools (Video Presentation)
description:
Tecan's AC Extraction Plate*, which is based on proprietary TICE™ (Tecan Immobilized Coating Extraction) technology, is a revolutionary, automation­friendly solution designed to streamline sample preparation for LC-MS analysis of small molecules
. 
The AC Extraction Plate is a 96-position, deep-well microplate, with each well containing an extractive TICE™ (Tecan Immobilized Coating Extraction) coating which acts as an extraction phase for small non-polar molecules, absorbing analytes from aqueous environments with high affinity, while proteins, phospholipids, carbohydrates and salts remain in solution

The AC Extraction Plate offers an open development platform that can be applied to sample preparation for a broad range of small molecules (such as vitamin D, steroids, and other small analytes) from biological fluids (including plasma, serum, whole blood, urine and saliva). Those analytes extracted from the AC Extraction Plate can be directly injected into an appropriate analytical detection system, such as LC/MS-MS. 

The AC Extraction Plate requires fewer and easier steps than with SPE and SLE (supported liquid
extraction) comparable plate based technology. Most importantly, with the AC Extraction Plate there is no need for filtration, centrifugation or evaporation. The AC Extraction Plate can also be used immediately, and does not require conditioning or prewashing.

Unlike many of these techniques, sample preparation with the AC Extraction Plate can also be easily automated, providing a rapid, walkaway solution for the extraction of small molecules from biological fluids for LC-MS analysis.

*For research use only -- not for clinical diagnostic applications

title: AC Extraction Plate (Video Presentation)
description:
Tecan's newly launched AC Extraction Plate is a revolutionary, automation­friendly solution designed to streamline sample preparation for LC-MS analysis of small molecules. The plate, which is based on proprietary TICE™ (Tecan Immobilized Coating Extraction) technology, reduces the sample preparation process to a convenient 'pipette and shake' routine. 

The AC Extraction Plate is a 96-position, deep-well microplate, with the inner surface of each well coated with a highly controlled layer of TICE material. This coating efficiently extracts low molecular weight analytes -- such as vitamin D and testosterone -- from aqueous solutions, eliminating the need for the laborious and time-consuming filtration, centrifugation and evaporation steps that are often integral to other methods. Unlike many of these techniques, sample preparation with the AC Extraction Plate can also be easily automated, providing a rapid, walkaway solution for the extraction of small molecules from biological fluids for LC-MS analysis.

title: Webinar: Drug-drug combinations made simple
description:
The Netherlands Cancer Institute Robotics and Screening Center (NRSC) has implemented a workflow to screen combinations of small molecule drug candidates that either restore or enhance a clinical response based on functional genomic data with high throughput platforms.

This work is set up using the HP D300 Digital Dispenser and have found that it saves time, along with offering flexible, accurate and user friendly setup. The NRSC will also describe a Synergy Tool which they are using for the data analysis.

Join Dr Roderick Beijersbergen and Dr Pasi Halonen from the NRSC to hear further details about this drug synergy workflow including some details for the analysis of the generated data along with Jessica Merlino from Tecan

title: Drawn to Science: HBV virus - the little big enemy
description:
Viruses are self-replicating nano-machines that stride the border between living and non-living. The hepatitis B virus in its chronic form can nest in the liver for years, sometimes as a tiny fragment of cyclic DNA. It is estimated that about 360 million people worldwide have chronic HBV infection, 75 percent being in Asia. Roche pRED (Pharma Research & Early Development) has active research programs targeting the hepatitis B virus.  For more information visit http://www.roche.com/research_and_development.htm

Praktikum während der Semesterferien? Mitten im Semester? Oder Pflichtpraktikum im 1. Praxissemester? Alles ist möglich! title: Infinite® M1000 PRO multi mode plate reader with Premium Quad4 Monochromators™ technology
description:
Tecan's Quad4 Monochromators technology uses two excitation monochromators and two emission monochromators. The premium Quad4 Monochromators system of the Infinite M1000 PRO plate reader further optimizes this technology, using a flash lamp with double the power and switchable flash frequency settings (for fluorescence intensity) to provide even more light to both the sample and the detector, as well as offering improved spectral blocking and extended stray light reduction down to 2x10-7.
The new Infinite M1000 PRO, Tecan's latest modular multimode microplate reader with AlphaScreen®/AlphaLISA® technology, is equipped with premium Quad4 Monochromators and also features adjustable bandwidth settings to ultra-fine tune the amount of excitation and emission light to optimize the sensitivity for fluorescence based measurements. You can run advanced assay types like FRET, TR-FRET, fluorescence polarization and glow/flash luminescence and eliminate the need for absorbance and fluorescence filters.

title: Ochrana žen před rakovinou děložního čípku
description:
Vysoce rizikové typy HPV jsou příčinou téměř všech případů rakoviny děložního čípku. Infekce HPV je docela běžná a ve většině případů je tělo samo schopno virus odstranit. U některých žen však infekce přetrvává, což může vést k rakovině děložního čípku. Z více než 40 potenciálně rakovinotvorných typů HPV, je 14 považováno za vysoce rizikové. Ale pouze dva typy HPV - 16 a 18 - jsou zodpovědné za přibližně 70 % karcinomů děložního čípku. Speciální test poskytuje individuální výsledky testů pro HPV 16 a 18, spolu se sdruženým výsledkem pro ostatních 12 vysoce rizikových genotypů, a tím umožňuje okamžitou identifikaci těchto žen, které jsou nejvíce ohroženy a potřebují okamžitý zásah. 

Další videa naleznete na http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: How international is Roche
description:
At Roche we believe in the merits of diversity. We embrace our people's visible and invisible differences -- be it age, gender, ethnicity, nationality, and religion or working/thinking styles, capabilities, preferences, and needs. And we value the richness and variety of ideas and approaches that result from these differences. Our approximately 81,500 employees worldwide represent over 126 different nationalities. In Switzerland alone, we have people from more than 70 countries working at Roche.

title: Innovation et qualité suisses depuis 100 ans
description:
Depuis 1913, V-ZUG est synonyme de Premium Swiss Quality. La qualité haut de gamme est non seulement une tradition maison, mais elle nous motive également à progresser: nos inventions et nos innovations posent régulièrement de nouveaux standards à l'échelle internationale. Nos clientes et nos clients sont au coeur de notre recherche, afin de leur proposer des appareils qui constituent des sources d'inspiration et sont synonymes du plus grand confort.

L'entreprise V-ZUG SA est aujourd'hui la seule marque complètement suisse d'appareils électro-ménagers et le seul fabricant à développer et produire des appareils haut de gamme, à la fois pour la cuisine et pour la buanderie à Zoug, au coeur de la Suisse. Le succès du «swiss made» depuis un siècle.

title: Forza innovativa e qualità svizzera da 100 anni
description:
Dal 1913 V-ZUG è sinonimo di Premium Swiss Quality. L'altissima qualità non è solo una nostra tradizione, ma soprattutto un impegno a progredire: le nostre scoperte e innovazioni pongono sempre nuovi standard di riferimento nel mondo. E al centro poniamo sempre voi, le nostre e i nostri clienti, con prodotti da cui potrete trarre ispirazione nella vostra cucina, offrendovi il massimo comfort.

V-ZUG SA oggi è l'unico marchio di elettrodomestici puramente svizzero e l'unico produttore che sviluppa e realizza apparecchi di grande valore per la cucina e per la lavanderia a Zugo, nel cuore della Svizzera. Swiss Made con successo, da 100 anni.

title: Innovationskraft und Schweizer Qualität seit 100 Jahren (Version International German)
description:
Seit 1913 steht V-ZUG für Premium Swiss Quality. Erstklassige Qualität ist nicht nur unsere Tradition, sondern vor allem auch die Verpflichtung zum Fortschritt: Unsere Erfindungen und Innovationen setzen weltweit immer wieder neue Standards. Dabei stellen wir Sie, unsere Kundinnen und Kunden, in den Mittelpunkt -- mit Geräten, die Sie in Ihrer Küche inspirieren und Ihnen höchsten Komfort bieten.

Die V-ZUG AG ist heute die einzige rein schweizerische Marke für Haushaltgeräte und der einzige Hersteller, der sowohl hochwertige Geräte für die Küche als auch für den Waschraum in Zug, im Herzen der Schweiz, entwickelt und produziert. Erfolgreiches Swiss Made seit 100 Jahren.

title: Infinite® 200 PRO NanoQuant
description:
The Infinite® 200 PRO NanoQuant was the first microplate reader to be developed specifically for absorbance applications with small sample size. This sensitive plate reader meets highest spectrometer capabilities covering the UV to NIR spectral range and is available with Tecan's Quad4 monochromators™ or with UV-stable filters, and can detect DNA concentrations as low as 1 ng/μl. This affordable plate reader represents a simplified version of the standard Infinite® 200 PRO multimode reader and is compatible with Tecan's patent pending NanoQuant Plate™.


Tecan's NanoQuant Plate - a powerful tool for nucleic acid applications

The Infinite® 200 PRO NanoQuant is the ideal solution for a broad range of applications for measuring DNA- or RNA- quantification, for quality control and labeling efficiency. It delivers excellent sensitivity, multiplexing capability and high format flexibility including 6 -- 384-well microplates as well as half-area plates and the NanoQuant Plate for low concentration and small sample size.

In the unique NanoQuant Plate a special quartz optic for each of the 16 samples guarantees outstanding performance and a high rate of reproducibility. The plate offers quick and easy cleaning to minimize the risk of cross contamination. In addition after a working day the plate can be even cleaned in an ultra sonic water bath for additional efficient cleaning. The NanoQuant Plate is compatible with an eight-channel pipette to easy dispense the samples on the 16 positions of the tool.


Easy to use software features for different applications

The latest i-control™ software includes new application-oriented features which enables more user comfort with the established methods by a minimum of user interventions, e.g. DNA or RNA quantification.

Depending on the application needs, DNA or RNA samples can be measured either with the NanoQuant Plate with low sample volume of 2 µl to conserve most of your precious samples, or e.g. half-area well plates can be used with a volume of 20 µl without wasting any volume of the measured sample. 

The Infinite 200 PRO NanoQuant can be upgraded with all additional detection modes that are available with the standard Infinite 200 PRO as required.

title: Innovationskraft und Schweizer Qualität seit 100 Jahren
description:
Seit 1913 steht V-ZUG für Premium Swiss Quality. Erstklassige Qualität ist nicht nur unsere Tradition, sondern vor allem auch die Verpflichtung zum Fortschritt: Unsere Erfindungen und Innovationen setzen weltweit immer wieder neue Standards. Dabei stellen wir Sie, unsere Kundinnen und Kunden, in den Mittelpunkt -- mit Geräten, die Sie in Ihrer Küche inspirieren und Ihnen höchsten Komfort bieten.

Die V-ZUG AG ist heute die einzige rein schweizerische Marke für Haushaltgeräte und der einzige Hersteller, der sowohl hochwertige Geräte für die Küche als auch für den Waschraum in Zug, im Herzen der Schweiz, entwickelt und produziert. Erfolgreiches Swiss Made seit 100 Jahren.

title: 100 YEARS OF V-ZUG: A forerunner celebrates its centenary
description:
V-ZUG has been an Ambassador of Premium Swiss Quality since 1913. Meticulous workmanship and leading technology, producing products with superior quality and striking elegance is a long tradition at V-ZUG. The company is committed to progress and innovation that drives to provide more efficient and user-friendly appliances in the kitchen and laundry room. Innovation by V-ZUG now sets the standard around the globe. Made in Switzerland for 100 years and now available to customers around the Globe.

Swiss manufacturing
V-ZUG has successfully established itself as a premium brand, where the expectations regarding the quality of appliances and timeless design are the highest. Top quality and innovation would not be possible at V-ZUG without tapping in to the heart of the Company. Today, the manufacturing tools used in production are still made within the company, as they have for 100 years. Innovative production technologies combined with superior workmanship lead to the highest levels of precision and quality. Each appliance is checked at every production stage. The company production approach is order and not mass production; V-ZUG manufacturing accepts no compromises on quality.

title: Which silicone fights moisture in my bathroom?
description:
Sika Sanisil® is a one-part acetoxycure silicone sealant that cures by reaction with atmospheric moisture to form a durable elastomer. Sika Sanisil® is suitable for sanitary and other applications where mildew resistance is required. Sika Sanisil® is resistant to moisture. In addition, it has excellent resistance to ageing, shrinkage, cracking and discolouring. It does not contain solvents.

Product benefits:
– Solvent free
– 100% silicone polymer
– fungus and mildew resistant
– excellent elasticity

title: SikaCem® Summer - for longer workability of concrete and mortar
description:
The product is ideal for elevated temperatures and concrete with longer transport times, difficult placing conditions, large volume pours, re-vibrated concrete, etc.

The advantages are a controlled delay of setting and hardening of concrete and cement-based mortar and a longer workability.

title: sigma 1/2014 Natural catastrophes and man-made disasters 2013
description: According to the latest sigma study, global insured losses from natural catastrophes and man-made disasters were USD 45 billion in 2013, down from USD 81 billion in 2012. title: Conversations | Public/Private | Museums Go Global
description:
Expanding the collecting and exhibiting mandates of many leading Western museums is accompanied by a host of unanswered questions: What aspects of global art culture should these institutions embrace? How should museums modify their approaches to collecting, programming, and educating? What institutional models should they adopt? And how are artists and institutions in other parts of the world responding to the intensified regional presence of Western institutions? Drawing on recent experiences with global initiatives and collaborations, this panel of leading curators and museum directors will explore the benefits and pitfalls of going global.
 
Patrick Charpenel, Director, Fundación Jumex, Mexico City; Chris Dercon, Director, Tate Modern, London; Chus Martinez, Chief Curator at El Museo del Barrio, New York; Alexandra Munroe, Samsung Senior Curator, Asian Art, Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum, New YorkModerator: András Szántó, Author and Consultant to arts and philanthropic organizations, New York

Filmed on site at Art Basel in Miami Beach, Friday, December 6, 2013

title: V-ZUG Steamer Combi-Steam SL «World first GourmetSteam»
description:
World first GourmetSteam - superb meals at the touch of a button

With the GourmetSteam programme you can bring the ability of a master chef into your home. Several dozen recipes from top chefs are programmed into the Combi-Steam SL. Choose one, press the corresponding key and the appliance makes it just like a Michelin star chef would in his kitchen. So we can give you guaranteed success that will turn even novices into cooking fans. Practice makes perfect? Forget it. V-ZUG technology makes it perfect for you.

With the new V-ZUG AutoCook there is no need to manually enter time, temperature, operating mode or weight. Whether it is a menu planned out for your invited guests or meals spontaneously put together from the garden, refrigerator or larder, the AutoCook always helps you to an excellent result easily, quickly and reliably. So even less practiced cooks can find their way to their guests' food-loving hearts right away.

description:
The regeneration programme for pre-prepared meals and convenience foods

With a special combination of steam and hot air, called Regeneration, you can warm up pre-prepared meals and convenience foods at the touch of a button without losing quality or moisture and bring it to the table as if it were freshly made. Dishes can be regenerated on several shelves at the same time without covering them. This programmeremoves the need for a microwave in the kitchen and ensures much more healthy and tasty results.

title: V-ZUG Steamer Combi-Steam SL Demonstration
description:
With a V-ZUG steamer you now have the best conditions for cooking balanced, healthy meals with pleasure. No other cooking method is as good for you as the pressure-less steam cooker.

Learn more about the V-ZUG Combi-Steam and enjoy our new video from Gourmet Acadamy Australia!

title: V-ZUG Steamer Innovative power Combi-Steam
description: Win rather than just keep up -- that has always been V-ZUG's motto. Our will to win and our know-how manifests itself in V-ZUG's discovery of the world's first Combi-Steam Oven. The most precious thing we have is our health and the famous saying 'You are what you eat' is even more true when you experience food cooked in one of our outstanding steam and oven combination appliances. With a steamer you now have the best conditions for cooking balanced, healthy meals with pleasure. No other cooking method is as good for you as the pressure-less steam cooker. This is the optimal way to retain vitamins and minerals during the cooking process and you can benefit from up to 22 % higher vitamin content and up to 36 % less fat.

title: V-ZUG Steamer Combi-Steam SL «Steaming»
description:
Cooking with steam has a long tradition - for example, in Asian cooking. Steaming is a much gentler way to prepare vegetables, fish and seafood than as opposed to poaching them in saltwater or cooking them in a frying pan. Steaming does a better job retaining the vitamins and minerals as well as the taste of the food.
ZUG transports the advantages of steaming food into the modern age. ZUG steamers cook fast, economically and gently- and they are extremely easy to clean.
Learn more about cooking with steam and the ingenious functions of a ZUG steamer.

title: What might future look like if we don't take D&I seriously?
description: Examine a fictitious world in which Swiss Re didn't take Diversity and Inclusion seriously. What might that world look like in 2019?

title: Vorschau: Swissbau Focus Arena - Bildung für die Bau- und Immobilienwirtschaft
description:
LIVE am Dienstag, 17. Januar 2012 um 16 Uhr in der Swissbau Focus Arena (Halle 1.2), an der Swissbau in Basel!

Die Bau- und Immobilienwirtschaft beklagt sich immer akzentuierter über einen akuten Mangel an qualifiziertem Nachwuchs. Der Personalnotstand ist so gross, dass heute viele Leute aus dem Ausland geholt werden müssen. 

In der Swissbau Focus Arena vom Dienstag, 17. Januar 2012, werden mögliche Antworten auf den Personalnotstand der Branche diskutiert. Welche Kompetenzen braucht unsere Bau- und Immobilienwirtschaft? Wohin führt die laufende Reform des Schweizer Bildungssystems? Welche Rollen sollen Universitäten und Fachhochschulen dabei spielen? Welche Karte fällt den Unternehmen und Fachverbänden zu?

Moderiert wird die Arena von Filippo Leutenegger. Die Diskussionsteilnehmer im inneren Kreis sind:
Daniel Büchel, Vizepräsident Bundesamt für Energie, Programmleiter EnergieSchweiz
Stefan Cadosch, Präsident SIA, Partner Architekturbüro cadosch & zimmermann
Ursula Renold, Direktorin Bundesamt für Berufsbildung und Technologie
Peter Schillinger, Zentralpräsident Suissetec, Geschäftsleiter Herzog Haustechnik AG

Zur Veranstaltungsteilnahme treffen Sie bitte pünktlich um 15.30 Uhr bei der Arena im Swissbau Focus (Halle 1.2) ein. Die Veranstaltung beginnt um 16.00 Uhr und wird live im Regionalfernsehen übertragen.

title: ViBmas un Sistema de gestión que promueve la salud en el entorno laboral
description:
Un Entorno Laboral Saludable -según la definición de la  Organización Mundial de la Salud- es aquel en que los trabajadores y directivos colaboran en un proceso de mejora continua para promover y proteger la salud, la seguridad y bienestar de los trabajadores y la sustentabilidad del ambiente de trabajo.

SGS ha desarrollado el programa viBmas; un  sistema de gestión que promueve la salud en el entorno laboral de un modo proactivo, con el objetivo de mejorar la organización y las condiciones de trabajo, promover la participación activa y fomentar el desarrollo individual.

viBmas consiste en un conjunto MULTIDISCIPLINAR de acciones cuyo objetivo es procurar el ÓPTIMO estado de salud FÍSICO, MENTAL y SOCIAL de la POBLACIÓN LABORAL.

title: A journey through Swiss Life Group
description: This entertaining corporate film gives a three-minute overview of the entire Swiss Life Group including its markets, products and services. The film uses stop motion photography: Over 2000 individual pictures were put together to make this film. This light-hearted technique facilitates an unconventional journey through our company.
tags: A journey through Swiss Life Group

title: 100/100: Roman Bader, Adventure Sports Specialist
description:
100 employees visit 100 customers:

Roman Bader, Adventure Sports Specialist
visited by Eliana Wüest, Special Tasks Digital Experience department, Swiss Life Switzerland

The customer:
Roman Bader, 33, lives in Kloten near Zurich with his wife and two-year-old daughter. He is Managing Director of Exclusive Adventure AG. His company offers private individuals and companies a variety of outdoor sports such as skydiving or canyoning, enabling him to turn his hobby into a career. The former Special Forces soldier likes to spend his free time quietly at home with his family. Roman Bader is a Swiss Life corporate and private client

The employee:
Eliana Wüst, 42, works in Marketing at Swiss Life for Special tasks in the Digital Experience department. She moved out of tourism over 15 years ago into an online start-up. Since then she has been exclusively involved with online marketing and digital projects.  Eliana Wüst likes to spend her free time in the outdoors, climbing mountains, participating in various outdoor sports or horse-riding.

The project:
Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Karl Albert «Charlie Kunz», Brass instrument maker
description:
100 employees visit 100 customers

Karl Albert «Charlie Kunz», Brass instrument maker
visited by Bernhard Maier, Head of Logistics & Strategic Purchasing, Swiss Life Germany

The customer:
Brass instrument maker Karl-Albert Kunz, 54, has been called «Charlie» by everyone since he was young. He is married, has three sons and lives in Saarbrücken. For 30 years the brass instrument maker has run his own workshop called «Freebell» on Futterstrasse in Saarbrücken that has made a name for itself for making and servicing brass instruments. In his spare time, Kunz works voluntarily for the fire service in Saarbrücken and has played the trumpet since he was a child. Karl-Albert Kunz has a life insurance policy with Swiss Life.

The employee:
Bernhard Maier, 47, is responsible for Logistics and Strategic Purchasing as Swiss Life in Munich. He has worked at the insurance company for five years in a position in which he has a lot of dealings with external partners. Having originally trained as a carpenter and worked in sales for over 15 years, Bernhard Maier says the following about his business partners: «I know who's sitting opposite me.» He lives to the south of Munich and has two sons. He most enjoys spending his free time with his family at his cottage in Austria. Bernhard Maier is also very active in sports: He goes canoeing, travels round the world, takes part in ski tours and enjoys motorcycling. 

The project:
Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Eléna Pojarov, musician
description:
100 employees visit 100 customers:

Eléna Pojarov, musician
visited by Horst Stirner, IT systems engineer, Swiss Life Germany

The customer:
Eléna Pojarov from Cologne loves music. She recently released her debut album «Drama 2.0», which sold well online. Security is important to her, that's why she studied business law before devoting herself fully to music. Swiss Life Select also offers her security through a Riester pension annuity, private liability and legal expenses insurance.

The employee:
Horst Stirner, 46, lives in Hanover with his family. He is a hobby musician - however he doesn't have much spare time these days as he is studying business IT as well as working. He has been working at Swiss Life Germany as an IT systems engineer for 14 years already and he takes every opportunity to see his work from an external perspective.

The project:
Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Anne Metry, hotelier
description:
100 employees visit 100 customers:
Anne Metry, hotelier
visited by Claude Locher, Treasury manager, Group Finance

The customer:
Anna Metry, 28, lives in the ski resort of Zermatt. Attending Thun Hotel Management School prepared her to take over management of the family hotel shortly after graduating. She works thoroughly in her private and professional life and does one thing at a time. She opted for pillar 3a private pension provision at Swiss Life while the family business is covered by a BVG management policy.

The employee:
laude Locher, 41, comes from Berne but has settled in Zurich. He gets around a lot – he graduated in economics from St. Gallen after spending time in Berne and Glasgow. In the Finance division of Swiss Life Holding he enjoys working in a team and occasionally going for a drink with them after work. «Hiding your opinion never helps anybody; you need to be direct and capable of accepting criticism,» he says.

The project:
Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Galina Vracheva,  Pianistin
description:
100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden:

Galina Vracheva, Pianistin
wurde besucht von: Tatiana Seelos, Risk & Asset Liability Manager, Swiss Life Schweiz

Die Kundin:
Galina Vracheva, 59, ist in Bulgarien aufgewachsen. Ausgebildet wurde sie hauptsächlich an den Konservatorien von Moskau und München. Auf den Bühnen der Welt improvisiert sie ohne vorbereitete Partituren und geht damit ein Risiko ein, das nur wenige Künstler bereit sind, auf sich zu nehmen. Dabei lässt sie sich von Stichworten des Publikums inspirieren. Seit rund fünf Jahren ist sie regelmässig zu Gast beim Schweizer Radio SRF 2 Kultur und im Bayerischen Rundfunk. Sie lebt mit ihrem Mann und Sohn in Zürich.

Die Mitarbeiterin:
Tatiana Seelos, 32, machte im Jahr 2010 ein Praktikum bei Swiss Life und wollte später unbedingt zurück. Seit 2013 hat sie eine Festanstellung. Sie ist in Moskau geboren und aufgewachsen und lebt seit 2006 in der Schweiz. In ihrer Freizeit tanzt sie Ballett und spielt Tennis, fotografiert leidenschaftlich, reist gerne und geniesst viele kulturelle Angebote. Sie lebt mit ihrem Ehemann in Rüschlikon am Zürichsee.

Das Projekt:
Bei der Aktion «100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden» spielen die Kunden die Hauptrolle. Swiss Life ermöglicht bis Ende 2015 100 Mitarbeitenden, die in ihrer täglichen Arbeit keinen Kundenkontakt haben, einen Kunden kennenzulernen.

title: Nestlé Fitness 14 Day Program برنامج نستله للياقة البدنية من 14 يوم
description:
"Having a hard time fitting into your favourite dress? Set off on the 14 Day Program from Nestlé Fitness. Replace your daily diet with two meals of Nestle Fitness Cereal and a third balanced meal. Get back in shape and into that dress in just 14 days.
هل تواجهين بعض الصعوبات لإرتداء الثوب المفضل لديك؟ انطلقي لممارسة برنامج رياضي من 14 يوم مع نستله للياقة البدنية. استبدلي نظامك الغذائي اليومي بوجبتين من حبوب نستله للياقة ووجبة ثالثة متوازنة . لتحصلي بعدها على الجسم المثالي وترتدين ثوبك المفضل في 14 يوم."

title: 100/100: Bernhard Maier (Swiss Life Deutschland) besucht Karl-Albert Kunz
description:
100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden:

Bei der Aktion «100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden» spielen die Kunden die Hauptrolle. Swiss Life ermöglicht bis Ende 2015 100 Mitarbeitenden, die in ihrer täglichen Arbeit keinen Kundenkontakt haben, einen Kunden kennenzulernen.

Der Kunde:
Metallblasinstrumentenmacher Karl-Albert Kunz, 54, wird seit seiner Jugend von allen «Charlie» genannt. Er ist verheiratet, hat drei Söhne und lebt in Saarbrücken. Seit dreissig Jahren führt der Metallblasinstrumentenmacher seine eigene Werkstatt «Freebell» an der Futterstrasse in Saarbrücken, die sich mit dem Bau und der Wartung von Blechinstrumenten einen Namen gemacht hat. Kunz ist in Saarbrücken in seiner Freizeit ehrenamtlich bei der Feuerwehr tätig und spielt seit seiner Kindheit Trompete. Karl-Albert Kunz hat seine Lebensversicherung bei Swiss Life abgeschlossen.

Der Mitarbeiter:
Bernhard Maier, 47, ist bei Swiss Life in München für Logistik und den strategischen Einkauf verantwortlich. Er arbeitet seit fünf Jahren bei der Versicherungsgesellschaft und hat in seiner Position sehr viel mit externen Partnern zu tun. Bernhard Maier, ursprünglich gelernter Schreiner und seit über 15 Jahren im Vertrieb tätig, sagt deshalb über seine Geschäftspartner: «Ich weiss, wer mir gegenüber sitzt.» Er wohnt südlich von München und hat zwei Söhne. Seine Freizeit verbringt er am liebsten mit seiner Familie auf seiner Hütte in Österreich. Zudem ist Bernhard Maier sportlich sehr aktiv: Er fährt Kanu, bereist die Welt, nimmt an Skitouren teil und fährt gerne Motorrad.

title: 100/100: Anna Metry, Hotelière
description:
100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden

Anna Metry, Hotelière
wurde besucht von: Claude Locher, Treasury Manager, Group Finance

Die Kundin:
Anna Metry, 28, lebt im Skiort Zermatt. Mit der Hotelfachschule Thun bereitete sie sich auf die Leitung des familieneigenen Hotels vor, was kurz nach dem Studium Realität wurde. Privat und beruflich erledigt sie eine Aufgabe nach der anderen, dafür richtig. So entschied sie sich bei Swiss Life für die private Vorsorge 3a, während das Familienunternehmen durch einen BVG-Kadervertrag abgesichert ist.

Der Mitarbeiter:
Claude Locher, 41, stammt aus Bern, hat aber in Zürich seine Heimat gefunden. Er ist viel in Bewegung – sein Wirtschaftsstudium beendete er in St. Gallen, nach den Stationen Bern und Glasgow. Im Finance-Bereich der Swiss Life Holding geniesst er die Arbeit im Team und das gelegentliche gemeinsame Feierabendbier. «Seine Meinung zu verschweigen, hilft niemandem weiter; man muss direkt und kritikfähig sein können», findet er.

Das Projekt:
Bei der Aktion «100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden» spielen die Kunden die Hauptrolle. Swiss Life ermöglicht bis Ende 2015 100 Mitarbeitenden, die in ihrer täglichen Arbeit keinen Kundenkontakt haben, einen Kunden kennenzulernen.

title: 100/100: Manuela Filip (Swiss Life Deutschland) besucht Sebastian Zinke
description:
100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden

Der Kunde:
Sebastian Zinke, 29, ist seit zwei Jahren Abwehrspieler der Fortuna Köln und seit neun Jahren im Profifussball aktiv, auch schon für RW Essen und den Wuppertaler SV. Geboren wurde er in Kassel – wie seine Frau, die im Oktober 2014 ihr erstes Kind erwartet. Beide möchten gerne in Köln bleiben, auch wenn es mit der Fussballkarriere vorbei ist. Dann kann sich Zinke vorstellen, im Versicherungswesen tätig zu werden.

Die Mitarbeiterin:
Manuela Filip, 22, ist im zweiten Ausbildungsjahr bei Swiss Life in München tätig. Ihr BWL-Studium hat sie abgebrochen, da sie das aktive Arbeitsleben kennenlernen wollte. Freunde und Spass sind ihr im Leben am wichtigsten und Bouldern ist ihr liebstes sportliches Hobby. Als waschechte Münchnerin ist sie natürlich Bayern-Fan, konnte den Tag bei der Fortuna in Köln aber in vollen Zügen geniessen.

title: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) Patients and Everyday Activities
description:
This video aims to illustrate what it is like to live with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary disease (COPD) while undertaking everyday activities via a split screen, depicting a person who has COPD alongside a person who doesn't.

 An actress is used in this video to depict what it is like to live with COPD. This video was made in collaboration with the British Lung Foundation (BLF).

 If you are concerned about any of the symptoms that feature in this video, speak to your healthcare professional. 

Learn more about COPD at: http://www.novartis.com/newsroom/feature-stories/2013/07/misconceptions-about-copd.shtml
or visit http://www.blf.org.uk.

title: Novartis Next Generation Scientist Program 2013
description: The Novartis Next Generation Scientist Program aims to increase the volume of drug discovery and clinical research in the emerging countries. Each year, ~20 senior Masters, PhD and post-doctoral healthcare scientists and clinicians are invited to a 3-month on-site research internship in Basel, Switzerland. The research program is complemented with intern-led training sessions on topics in drug discovery and development run with Novartis scientists, as well as an intensive applied communication and leadership skills training curriculum.

title: Archive footage from Nestle Personnel

It was filmed by the Nestlé Personnel department and includes footage of every Nestlé UK office or factory in operation at the time. The Kodachrome film stock adds a luscious quality to the colour footage of bright boiled sweets rolling off the production line. One of the film's highlights is footage of the employees' sports groups, including lunchtime archery practice in the grounds of one factory.

title: Michael Sorkin on anthropogenic disasters
description:
For Swiss Re's Open Minds project we capture a global diversity of voices. What do people from around the world think about longevity, food security, climate change, natural disasters, sustainable energy solutions? 

In this interview, held shortly after hurricane Sandy struck, architect and urbanist Michael Sorkin talks about hurricanes Sandy and Katrina and how they were both particularly disastrous because of how humans built and changed the natural environments. He stresses that global warming is real and that topics such as living and building by the shores needs to be addressed urgently.

Watch the clip, then visit us on the Open Minds platform (http://openminds.swissre.com/). Tell us what's on your mind, find out what others discuss and join the conversations.

title: Swiss Life - Cavern Street – Hello Tomorrow
description: Mit dem Song «Hello Tomorrow» zelebriert die Swiss Life-Mitarbeiterband «Cavern Street» das «längere, selbstbestimmte Leben», für das Swiss Life einsteht. Die Bandmitglieder mussten sich 2013 in einem internen Casting beweisen und feierten im Januar 2014 ihren ersten grossen Auftritt an einem Mitarbeiteranlass von Swiss Life Schweiz.

title: Charles Eugster on successful aging
description:
For the Open Minds project we capture a global diversity of voices. What do people from around the world think about longevity, food security, climate change, natural disasters, sustainable energy solutions? Charles Eugster, born in 1919 and now the world's oldest competitive oarsman and body-builder, knows a lot about successful aging. His recipe? Work, diet, exercise - in that order. Watch the clip, then visit us on the Open Minds platform. Tell us what's on your mind, find out what others discuss and join the conversations.

Visit the Open Minds platform at http://openminds.swissre.com/
Find out more about Charles Eugster at http://www.charleseugster.net/

description:
Watch the full video here: https://youtu.be/-GZonz4ls-g / Access the complete playlist here: #F1Entrepreneurs

How did Toto Wolff help the Silver Arrows create a new direction and achieve its collective goal? 

Find out the story behind Toto's first visit to MERCEDES AMG PETRONAS and the teamwork required to turn it in to the dominant force it is today.

Toto Wolff is Head of Mercedes-Benz Motorsport and has led the Formula 1 team to two successive World Championships.

title: 1. Toto Wolff - Roots and background
description:

Toto Wolff is Head of Mercedes-Benz Motorsport and has led the Formula 1 team to two successive World Championships. 

Is Toto Wolff an optimist or a realist?

Small Cells World 2015: u-blox impressions and small cells' trends
description: u-blox participated at Small Cells World 9-11 June in London, UK. This event is specifically targeted at the mobile operator / end user community CTOs, engineers and senior managers, helping them select the strategic and technology partners that are right for them. In this video, you get to see snippets from the event as well as learn of the trends u-blox sees in small cells. In our booth, visitors could discuss with the u-blox experts new products for base-station and backhaul synchronisation using GPS, GLONASS, BeiDou and Galileo satellites. u-blox' product portfolio includes LTE modems, Wi-Fi, GNSS positioning, timing and frequency-control solutions for the Internet of Things that really matter.

title: Dusch WC von Geberit AquaClean - Rosa berichtet über ihre Erfahrung
description: Rosa hat das Dusch-WC erstmals bei einer Freundin ausprobiert. Anfangs war die Benutzung noch ungewohnt, doch ein offenes und aufklärendes Gespräch mit ihrer Freundin hat sie überzeugt. Heute will Rosa auf das Dusch WC Geberit AquaClean nicht mehr verzichten und schätzt daran das gute Gefühl der Sauberkeit, der Frische und des Wohlbefindens. Die Nutzung des Dusch WC von Geberit gehört heute für Rosa zur täglichen Körperhygiene genauso unverzichtbar dazu wie das Zähneputzen.

title: WC mit Dusche: Erfahrungsbericht von Thomas zu Geberit AquaClean
description: Thomas ist schon als Kind in einem Haushalt mit einem WC mit Duschfunktion aufgewachsen. Später konnte er dann auch seine eigene Familie von den Vorzügen der Reinigung mit Wasser überzeugen. An Geberit AquaClean hat ihn vor allem der hohe Komfort und das elegante Design überzeugt. Auch die Möglichkeit, Geberit AquaClean als Aufsatz schnell, kostengünstig und einfach zu installieren, ohne eine aufwändige Badrenovierung vornehmen zu müssen, sprach für Thomas für das innovative Dusch WC.

title: Swatch Prime Line 2016 - Teaser
DuschWC: John erzählt über sein DuschWC von Geberit AquaClean
description: John wurde durch einen guten Freund auf das DuschWC Aqua AquaClean Clean aufmerksam. Nach einem Besuch auf einer Messe und der dortigen Beratung am Geberit AquaClean Stand war er von dem System endgültig überzeugt und installierte das DuschWC in seinem Zuhause. Neben der angenehmen Reinigung und dem hohen Maß an Hygiene schätzt John auch den ökologischen Aspekt, den das DuschWC von Geberit bietet.

title: Swatch Freeride World Tour Verbier – Highlights
Geberit WC AquaClean Erfahrungsbericht: Doris über Ihr Geberit WC AquaClean
description: Von ihrem Mann wurde Doris auf das Geberit WC mit Duschfunktion aufmerksam gemacht. Schon nach der ersten Nutzung war ihr klar, dass sie auf die sanfte Reinigung und das angenehme, frische Gefühl danach nicht mehr verzichten möchte. Doris schätzt an dem Geberit WC die Reinigung mit purem Wasser als hautschonende und allergiefreie Alternative zu feuchten Tüchern und sieht es als Investition in ihr Bad als Komfort- und Wellnessbereich zu Hause. Auch die leichte Handhabung erlebt sie bei dem Geberit WC AquaClean als sehr praktisch.

title: Dusch WC Test: Renate über Geberit AquaClean
description: In einer Wohnzeitschrift hat Renate Geberit AquaClean für sich entdeckt. Die Wienerin, die viel Wert auf Ästhetik und Design legt, fühlte sich von der Optik des Dusch-WCs sofort angesprochen. Auf einer Einrichtungsmesse entschied sie sich dann endgültig für die Installation und war bereits vom ersten Dusch WC Test in der Praxis begeistert. Neben dem Design ist es insbesondere das angenehme Gefühl, weswegen Renate Geberit AquaClean nicht mehr missen möchte. Auch ihr Mann, der anfänglich Zweifel hegte, war nach dem eigenen Dusch WC Test überzeugt -- ebenso wie Gäste von Renate immer wieder begeistert sind von der innovativen Toilette.

title: Geberit AquaClean und der Erfahrungsbericht von Fritz
description: Fritz erfuhr von Geberit AquaClean von einem Freund. Nachdem er und seine Frau das Dusch WC ausprobiert hatten, waren sie beide so begeistert, dass sie es zu Hause auch haben wollten. Besonders schätzt Fritz die gründliche und schonende Reinigung mit warmem Wasser, aber auch die leichte Bedienung von Geberit AquaClean. Durch die vier Speicherfunktionen kann jedes Familienmitglied auf Knopfdruck sein eigenes WC Duschprogramm starten. Für Geberit AquaClean würde Fritz sich immer wieder entscheiden.

Sie haben daher einen grossen Einfluss darauf, ob die Normen zum elektrischen Energieverbrauch im Hochbau eingehalten werden. Volker Weuters, Präsident der Kommission SIA 380/4, erklärt die Zusammenhänge

Das Behindertengleichstellungsgesetz soll sicherstellen, dass alle Menschen überall Zugang haben. Aufzüge machen dies möglich. Joe Manser, Architekt und Geschäftsführer der Schweizerischen Fachstelle für behindertengerechtes Bauen, erläutert die im Bauwesen zu berücksichtigen Normen und wie diese praktisch umgesetzt werden.

title: "Side Lunges" | WELLNESS EXERCISE | Nestlé PH
description:
The following exercises were chosen on the basis of the body parts they will improve. Seven body parts were identified and two exercises were chosen per body part. These exercises may be performed one after the other, in sequence, during one training session, allowing a minute or two of rest in between sets, and around 2 to 3 minutes rest in between exercises. OR, in several bouts of one to two exercises per bout in a day or on consecutive days until all exercises in the roster are done, making one cycle of exercises. After which a new cycle of the exercises can be started. 

It may also be done in circuit fashion, doing one set of each of the exercises, one after the other, without resting. Rest is only allowed after all exercises are done one set each. A two to three minute rest is then taken before starting a new circuit. Two to three circuits or sets maybe done. 

For optimal gains, do two to three sets, two to three times weekly, on non-consecutive days. One may also choose to do a particular exercise more often if one wishes to emphasize on a particular body part.

Consistently doing the exercises will provide improvements to one's exercise and functional capacity. The exercises will be easier to do and gains will plateau. In this case, one may increase the number of repetitions by two repetitions each time until 20 repetitions per set is reached. After that, resistance may be increased by adding medicine balls to the movements, or in case they are already being used, wielding heavier and bigger medicine balls.

Since the exercises are of a light index of difficulty, a warm up is optional. If so desired, it may consist of a two to three minute walk, 10 to 15 knee bends, and eight to ten repetitions of single leg toe touches for each leg.

HIPS

Side lunges
• Stand erect, feet together and hands across the chest. A medicine ball maybe held by the hands in front if additional weight is desired.
• While making sure that trunk is erect, take a step to one side and bend one knee to squat, making sure the foot of the supporting leg is flat on the floor. Inhale while doing so.
• Make sure the non-supporting leg is straight and its foot pointing up toward the ceiling.
• Squat until the supporting leg's thigh is parallel to the ground
• Recover and return to starting position while exhaling.
• Do eight to ten repetitions.

title: Reverse Woodchops | WELLNESS EXERCISE | Nestlé PH
description:
The following exercises were chosen on the basis of the body parts they will improve. Seven body parts were identified and two exercises were chosen per body part. These exercises may be performed one after the other, in sequence, during one training session, allowing a minute or two of rest in between sets, and around 2 to 3 minutes rest in between exercises. OR, in several bouts of one to two exercises per bout in a day or on consecutive days until all exercises in the roster are done, making one cycle of exercises. After which a new cycle of the exercises can be started. 

It may also be done in circuit fashion, doing one set of each of the exercises, one after the other, without resting. Rest is only allowed after all exercises are done one set each. A two to three minute rest is then taken before starting a new circuit. Two to three circuits or sets maybe done. 

For optimal gains, do two to three sets, two to three times weekly, on non-consecutive days. One may also choose to do a particular exercise more often if one wishes to emphasize on a particular body part.

Consistently doing the exercises will provide improvements to one's exercise and functional capacity. The exercises will be easier to do and gains will plateau. In this case, one may increase the number of repetitions by two repetitions each time until 20 repetitions per set is reached. After that, resistance may be increased by adding medicine balls to the movements, or in case they are already being used, wielding heavier and bigger medicine balls.

Since the exercises are of a light index of difficulty, a warm up is optional. If so desired, it may consist of a two to three minute walk, 10 to 15 knee bends, and eight to ten repetitions of single leg toe touches for each leg.
 
ABDOMINALS
1. Reverse woodchops
• Start by lowering medicine ball towards the side of the right knee by twisting  
trunk and bending both knees. 
• All the while, maintain erect trunk position.
• In a single motion, stand up to tiptoe position while tracing a diagonal upward path toward above the left shoulder with the medicine ball. 
• Make sure trunk stretch is full
• Return to the starting position.
• Do it eight times. Do both sides for two to three sets each.
• Make sure the downward movement is controlled and done twice as slow as the upward movement
• Inhale during the downward and recovery movement. Exhale during the upward and active movement 
• Guard your back at all times
• Do eight to ten repetitions

http://nestle.com.ph/
http://nestlephilippineschoosewellness.blogspot.com/

title: Proyecto Sofia Mulanovich - Episode 4
"Forward Ball Rolls" | WELNESS EXERCISE | Nestlé PH
description:
The following exercises were chosen on the basis of the body parts they will improve. Seven body parts were identified and two exercises were chosen per body part. These exercises may be performed one after the other, in sequence, during one training session, allowing a minute or two of rest in between sets, and around 2 to 3 minutes rest in between exercises. OR, in several bouts of one to two exercises per bout in a day or on consecutive days until all exercises in the roster are done, making one cycle of exercises. After which a new cycle of the exercises can be started. 

It may also be done in circuit fashion, doing one set of each of the exercises, one after the other, without resting. Rest is only allowed after all exercises are done one set each. A two to three minute rest is then taken before starting a new circuit. Two to three circuits or sets maybe done. 

For optimal gains, do two to three sets, two to three times weekly, on non-consecutive days. One may also choose to do a particular exercise more often if one wishes to emphasize on a particular body part.

Consistently doing the exercises will provide improvements to one's exercise and functional capacity. The exercises will be easier to do and gains will plateau. In this case, one may increase the number of repetitions by two repetitions each time until 20 repetitions per set is reached. After that, resistance may be increased by adding medicine balls to the movements, or in case they are already being used, wielding heavier and bigger medicine balls.

Since the exercises are of a light index of difficulty, a warm up is optional. If so desired, it may consist of a two to three minute walk, 10 to 15 knee bends, and eight to ten repetitions of single leg toe touches for each leg.
 
ABDOMINALS

Forward ball rolls
• Kneel in front of the ball. 
• With palms facing inward, place both hands on the ball 
• Tighten the abdominal muscles and guard the back
• Slowly roll the ball out towards the front until both arms and the whole trunk are stretched. Inhale while doing so.
• Return to the starting position by rolling back ball while exhaling. 
• Maintain the contraction of the abdominal muscles all throughout the movement.
• Do eight to ten repetitions.

Watch out for more Wellness exercise videos!

http://nestlephilippineschoosewellness.blogspot.com
